description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Code sub-tab today renders a flat list of file diffs with no quick way to jump or skip. Two improvements:

1. Mini-TOC at the top of each Code tab showing the touched files as a folder/file tree (folder structure visible). Each leaf links to that file's diff anchor.
2. Each file diff wraps in <details> so reviewers can collapse files they've already read.

Apply the same treatment to the 'outside the spec system' misc panel since it has the same UX problem.
title: Polish v3: file tree + collapsible diffs in Code tab and misc panel
